use_cases: Displaying image portfolios with smooth 3D flip transitions between photos
Creating engaging product showcases with animated image reveals
Building photography or creative project galleries with tactile transitions
Implementing interactive media galleries for portfolio websites
ai_summary: A media gallery component featuring smooth 3D flip animations between images using CSS rotateX transforms. The component includes navigation controls and displays image titles, providing an engaging way to showcase collections of photos or visual content with a distinctive flip transition effect.
